## Verification

- [ ] I worked on a branch in my own fork and am targeting this repository's `main` branch.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes.
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev` reports no production vulnerabilities introduced by this change.
- [ ] I tested the relevant desktop controls.
- [ ] I tested mobile-landscape behavior, or this change cannot affect it.
- [ ] I included a screenshot or short recording for a visual change.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, `.env` files, Vercel metadata or personal information.
- [ ] I did not include private child/family media or third-party assets I lack permission to contribute.
- [ ] The change follows `VISUAL_ACCEPTANCE.md` and preserves gentle retry-without-penalty play.
